Defines test endpoint ID constants for communication sessions.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines several preprocessor macros for endpoint identifiers. The macros `NON_EXISTENT_ENDPOINT_ID` and `OTHER_NON_EXISTENT_ENDPOINT_ID` are set to `0` and `0xffff`, respectively, indicating non-existent endpoints. The macros `PRIVATE_TEST_ENDPOINT_ID`, `PUBLIC_TEST_ENDPOINT_ID`, and `ANY_TEST_ENDPOINT_ID` are assigned the values `1`, `2`, and `3`, respectively, and are likely used to represent different types of test endpoints. The `#pragma once` directive ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
